title: writing step input
description: CLI args contract for the writing workflow step.

base_path.description: Base path for the workflow workspace.

format.description: Output format for the written content.

draft.description: Flag indicating draft mode (passed as a bare flag, no value).

repo.description: Source code repo paths (can be multiple).

fix_from.description: Step name to fix from (e.g. 'technical-review' or 'quality-gate').
